name: D3 Ch12 — Vault of the Drow Wandering Monsters, River and Lake (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for River and Lake terrain in the Vault of the Drow, Chapter 12 of D3. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12 per turn. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d12 on this table. Use when near the Pitchy Flow river, Lake Xool, or any significant water body in the Vault.

results.text: Giant gar (1–3; HD 6, hp 50, AC 5, #AT 1, Dmg 5–20; XPV 650 each)
Kuo-toan patrol (4–8 warriors + 1 monitor; warriors HD 2 hp 12 XPV 60; monitor HD 7 hp 56 THAC0 13 XPV 1,098; see D2 shrine notes)
Vodyanoi — water troll (1–3; HD 8, hp 56, AC 2, #AT 3, Dmg 3–12/3–12/2–8, regenerate as troll; XPV 1,040 each)
Drow boat patrol (3–6 fighters HD 3+3 hp 22, 1 patrol leader HD 5+5 hp 40; armed with hand crossbows and spears; XPV 175/400 each)
Giant crabs (2–5; HD 3, hp 18, AC 2, #AT 2, Dmg 2–8/2–8; XPV 65 each)
Water weird (1–2; HD 3+3, hp 22, AC 4, entangle — pulls victim into water; XPV 225 each)
Lake trolls (1–2; aquatic troll; HD 6+6, hp 50, regenerate; XPV 749 each)
Koalinth (3–8; sea hobgoblins; HD 1+1, hp 7, AC 5, #AT 1, Dmg 1–8; armed with trident; XPV 15 each)
Giant catfish (1–2; HD 8, hp 56, AC 4, whisker-stun on hit — save vs. paralysis or stunned 1d4 rounds; XPV 1,000 each)
Giant pike (1–3; HD 4, hp 28, AC 5, #AT 1, Dmg 3–12; XPV 195 each)
Sahaugin (4–8; HD 2+2, hp 14, AC 5, #AT 4, Dmg 1–4/1–4/1–4/1–4; XPV 65 each)
Morkoth (1; HD 7, hp 56, AC 0, THAC0 13, charm spiral — any creature looking at it must save vs. spells or walk into water; XPV 1,150)
